tools.name: show_degree_planner
tools.description:
Use this tool for higher-education degree planning with StraighterLine transfer-credit scenarios.

Call when the user wants any of:
- A degree completion plan (associate, bachelor, or master)
- Timeline-to-graduation estimates
- Cost estimates or savings comparisons vs. traditional tuition
- Credit-transfer strategy and path optimization
- Study-load planning based on weekly availability
